description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle featuring a matte black and gray finish, with a robust fixed stock and a prominent, boxy magazine. The rifle is equipped with a bipod for stability during firing, and the barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the handguard. The receiver and handguard are constructed from metal, with polymer components visible on the stock and grip. The magazine is a large, drum-style, suggesting high ammunition capacity, and the rifle includes iron sights for aiming. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for sustained use in urban environments.
description: A tactical rifle with a fixed stock, long barrel, bipod, and large drum magazine, finished in matte black and gray. Features iron sights and a robust, utilitarian build.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, long barrel, bipod, and large drum magazine.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow profile, bipod legs, and the drum magazine protruding to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, magazine, and bipod, with the receiver and handguard details visible.
description_view_3: Barrel-end view emphasizing the bipod stance, muzzle, and the width of the drum magazine.
